title: lobelia stellata
intro: Lobelia stellata, also known as the sky blue lobelia, is a perennial wildflower native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The plant has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive issues and anxiety. Lobelia stellata is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be smoked or ingested as a powder in traditional herbal preparations.
